e2ee/blake2b

        toHexDigest
      • toHexDigest(digest: openArray[byte]): string
        update
      • update(state: var Blake2b; chunk: openArray[byte])

      • verifyDigest(a, b: openArray[byte]): bool
      • verifyDigest(a, b: string): bool

This module implements a high-level API for the BLAKE2b hash funcionality provided by th Monocypher library. It includes functions for computing BLAKE2b hashes, keyed hashes (MACs), and incremental hashing with a stateful Blake2b object.

The API is designed to be easy to use while still providing access to the full functionality of the underlying library. It also includes utility functions for converting digests to hex strings and verifying digests in constant time

Imports

private/monocypher, private/utils, password

Types

Blake2b = object
The Blake2b type represents the state of an incremental BLAKE2b hash computation. It allows you to update the hash with chunks of data and then finish to get the final digest.

Consts

Blake2bDefaultDigestSize = 32
Blake2bMaxDigestSize = 64
Blake2bMaxKeySize = 64
Blake2bMinDigestSize = 1

Procs

proc blake(message: openArray[byte]; hashSize: int = Blake2bDefaultDigestSize): seq[
    byte] {....raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Compute the BLAKE2b hash of the message. The hash size must be between 1 and 64 bytes, default is 32 bytes (256 bits). 
proc blake(message: string; hashSize: int = Blake2bDefaultDigestSize): seq[byte] {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Compute the BLAKE2b hash of the message. The hash size must be between 1 and 64 bytes, default is 32 bytes (256 bits). 
proc blakeHex(message: openArray[byte]; hashSize: int = Blake2bDefaultDigestSize): string {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Compute the BLAKE2b hash of the message and return it as a hex string. The hash size must be between 1 and 64 bytes, default is 32 bytes (256 bits). 
proc blakeHex(message: string; hashSize: int = Blake2bDefaultDigestSize): string {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Compute the BLAKE2b hash of the message and return it as a hex string. The hash size must be between 1 and 64 bytes, default is 32 bytes (256 bits). 
proc blakeKeyed(message, key: string; hashSize: int = Blake2bDefaultDigestSize): seq[
    byte] {....raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Compute a keyed BLAKE2b hash. The key is used to create a MAC (message authentication code) instead of a general-purpose hash. 
proc blakeKeyed(message: openArray[byte]; key: openArray[byte];
                hashSize: int = Blake2bDefaultDigestSize): seq[byte] {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Compute a keyed BLAKE2b hash. The key is used to create a MAC (message authentication code) instead of a general-purpose hash. 
proc blakeKeyedHex(message, key: string;
                   hashSize: int = Blake2bDefaultDigestSize): string {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Compute a keyed BLAKE2b hash and return it as a hex string. The key is used to create a MAC (message authentication code). 
proc blakeKeyedHex(message: openArray[byte]; key: openArray[byte];
                   hashSize: int = Blake2bDefaultDigestSize): string {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Compute a keyed BLAKE2b hash and return it as a hex string. The key is used to create a MAC (message authentication code). 
proc finish(state: var Blake2b): seq[byte] {....raises: [ValueError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Finish the Blake2b hash and return the digest. The state is finalized after this call. 
proc finishHex(state: var Blake2b): string {....raises: [ValueError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Finish the Blake2b hash and return the digest as a hex string. The state is finalized after this call. 
proc initBlake2b(hashSize: int = Blake2bDefaultDigestSize): Blake2b {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Initialize a Blake2b state with the given hash size. The hash size must be between 1 and 64 bytes. 
proc initBlake2bKeyed(key: openArray[byte];
                      hashSize: int = Blake2bDefaultDigestSize): Blake2b {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Initialize a keyed Blake2b state with the given key and hash size. The key must be 1..64 bytes. 
proc initBlake2bKeyed(key: string; hashSize: int = Blake2bDefaultDigestSize): Blake2b {.
    ...raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Initialize a keyed Blake2b state with the given key and hash size. The key is used to create a MAC (message authentication code) instead of a general-purpose hash. 
proc toHexDigest(digest: openArray[byte]): string {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Convert a binary digest to a hex string. Each byte is represented by two hex characters. 
proc update(state: var Blake2b; chunk: openArray[byte]) {....raises: [ValueError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Update the Blake2b state with a chunk of data. Can be called multiple times before finishing. 
proc update(state: var Blake2b; chunk: string) {....raises: [ValueError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Update the Blake2b state with a chunk of data. Can be called multiple times before finishing. 
proc verifyDigest(a, b: openArray[byte]): bool {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Constant-time comparison of two digests. Returns true if they are equal. 
proc verifyDigest(a, b: string): bool {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Constant-time comparison of two digests. Returns true if they are equal.
